name: Gajakesari Yoga
condition: Jupiter in kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th) from Moon
effects: Intelligence, fame, wealth, respected in society. Person becomes wise and influential. Good for public life, teaching, advisory roles.
strengthFactors: Stronger if Jupiter is in own/exalted sign. Weakened if Jupiter is debilitated, combust, or aspected by malefics.

name: Budhaditya Yoga
condition: Sun and Mercury conjunct in same house
effects: Sharp intellect, excellent communication skills, scholarly mind. Good for careers in writing, teaching, consulting, IT, law.
strengthFactors: Best when Mercury is not combust (more than 14 degrees from Sun). Strongest in houses 1, 4, 5, 7, 9, 10.

name: Raj Yoga
condition: Lord of kendra (1/4/7/10) and lord of trikona (1/5/9) conjunct or mutually aspect each other
effects: Power, authority, success in career, leadership qualities. Rise in status and wealth. Government connections possible.
strengthFactors: Strongest when involving 9th and 10th lords. Multiple Raj Yogas amplify each other.

name: Dhana Yoga
condition: Lords of 2nd and 11th houses connected (conjunction, aspect, or exchange). Also 1st lord with 2nd/11th.
effects: Wealth accumulation, financial prosperity, multiple income sources. Good for business and investment.
strengthFactors: Stronger with benefic planets. Jupiter involvement amplifies. Weakened if lords are debilitated.

name: Viparita Raja Yoga
condition: Lords of 6th, 8th, or 12th houses placed in each other's houses (e.g., 6th lord in 8th, 8th lord in 12th)
effects: Success through adversity. Gains from enemies' loss. Unexpected rise after difficulties. Fortune from inheritance or insurance.
strengthFactors: Strongest when all three dusthana lords are in each other's houses.

name: Neechabhanga Raja Yoga
condition: A debilitated planet gets cancellation of debilitation — e.g., lord of the sign where planet is debilitated is in kendra from Moon/Lagna
effects: Initial struggles transform into great success. Person overcomes disadvantage to achieve remarkable heights. Late bloomer.
strengthFactors: Multiple cancellation conditions strengthen it further.

name: Kaal Sarpa Yoga
condition: All seven planets (Sun through Saturn) hemmed between Rahu and Ketu on one side of the axis
effects: Obstacles, delays, feeling stuck. Life feels like constant struggle. Karmic debts from past lives. Success comes only after significant effort.
strengthFactors: Partial Kaal Sarpa (some planets outside) is milder. Stronger when Rahu-Ketu in 1-7 or 5-11 axis.

name: Manglik Dosha
condition: Mars in houses 1, 2, 4, 7, 8, or 12 from Lagna, Moon, or Venus
effects: Delays in marriage, conflicts in married life, partner health concerns. Intensity in relationships. Strong will and temper.
strengthFactors: Cancelled if Mars in own/exalted sign, or partner also has Manglik dosha. Age after 28 naturally reduces intensity.

name: Chandra-Mangal Yoga
condition: Moon and Mars conjunct in same house
effects: Financial gains through own effort. Brave, determined, industrious. Good for real estate, property, maternal inheritance.
strengthFactors: Best in houses 2, 4, 10, 11. Weakened in 6, 8, 12.

name: Hamsa Yoga
condition: Jupiter in own sign (Sagittarius/Pisces) or exalted (Cancer) in kendra from Lagna
effects: Highly learned, virtuous, respected by rulers. Wealthy, handsome/beautiful, long-lived. Natural teacher and advisor.
strengthFactors: One of the five Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas. Strongest in 1st or 10th house.

name: Malavya Yoga
condition: Venus in own sign (Taurus/Libra) or exalted (Pisces) in kendra from Lagna
effects: Beautiful appearance, luxurious lifestyle, artistic talents, happy marriage, wealth through vehicles and property.
strengthFactors: One of the five Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas. Strongest in 1st or 7th house.

name: Ruchaka Yoga
condition: Mars in own sign (Aries/Scorpio) or exalted (Capricorn) in kendra from Lagna
effects: Commander-like personality, brave, athletic, successful in military/police/sports. Sharp features, strong body, leadership.
strengthFactors: One of the five Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas. Strongest in 1st or 10th house.

name: Sasa Yoga
condition: Saturn in own sign (Capricorn/Aquarius) or exalted (Libra) in kendra from Lagna
effects: Authority over villages/towns, politically powerful, wealth from industry/labor. Disciplined, persistent, respected elder.
strengthFactors: One of the five Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas. Strongest in 1st or 10th house.

name: Bhadra Yoga
condition: Mercury in own sign (Gemini/Virgo) or exalted (Virgo) in kendra from Lagna
effects: Intelligent, eloquent speaker, skilled in arts and commerce. Success in business, writing, teaching. Strong analytical mind.
strengthFactors: One of the five Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas. Strongest in 1st or 10th house.

name: Saraswati Yoga
condition: Jupiter, Venus, and Mercury in kendra or trikona, with Jupiter in own/exalted/friend's sign
effects: Highly educated, master of arts and sciences, eloquent, poetic ability. Excellence in academics and creative fields.
strengthFactors: Rare yoga. All three planets should be strong and unafflicted.

name: Lakshmi Yoga
condition: Lord of 9th house strong and in kendra, with Lagna lord also strong
effects: Great wealth, fortune, luxurious life. Born into or acquires significant prosperity. Blessed by Goddess Lakshmi.
strengthFactors: Strongest when 9th lord is in own/exalted sign in 1st or 10th house.

name: Adhi Yoga
condition: Benefics (Jupiter, Venus, Mercury) in 6th, 7th, and 8th from Moon
effects: Polite, trustworthy, healthy, wealthy, able to overcome enemies. Leadership position in profession.
strengthFactors: Strongest when all three benefics are present. Even one or two create partial Adhi Yoga.

name: Sunapha Yoga
condition: Any planet (except Sun) in the 2nd house from Moon
effects: Self-made wealth, intelligent, good reputation. Earns through own merit, not inheritance.
strengthFactors: Results vary based on which planet occupies 2nd from Moon.

name: Anapha Yoga
condition: Any planet (except Sun) in the 12th house from Moon
effects: Strong physique, virtuous, comfortable life, good character. Well-dressed and dignified.
strengthFactors: Results vary based on which planet occupies 12th from Moon.

name: Durudhara Yoga
condition: Planets (except Sun) on both sides of Moon — in 2nd and 12th from Moon
effects: Wealthy, generous, enjoys vehicles and comforts. Famous, eloquent, charitable.
strengthFactors: Combines benefits of both Sunapha and Anapha yogas.

name: Amala Yoga
condition: Natural benefic (Jupiter, Venus, Mercury, or full Moon) in 10th from Lagna or Moon
effects: Lasting fame, virtuous deeds, respected by society. Clean reputation throughout life.
strengthFactors: Jupiter in 10th gives best results. Mercury gives intellectual fame.

name: Veshi Yoga
condition: Any planet (except Moon) in 2nd house from Sun
effects: Truthful, lazy but capable, good memory, balanced temperament.
strengthFactors: Benefic in 2nd from Sun gives positive results; malefic gives mixed.

name: Vosi Yoga
condition: Any planet (except Moon) in 12th house from Sun
effects: Skilled, charitable, learned, good stamina.
strengthFactors: Benefic in 12th from Sun gives spiritual tendencies; malefic gives material focus.

name: Parvata Yoga
condition: Benefics in kendras, 6th and 8th houses are either empty or occupied by benefics
effects: Wealthy, famous, generous ruler-type personality. Protector of others.
strengthFactors: Rare when fully formed. Even partial formation gives good results.
